nasb.text: For My eyes are on all their ways; they are not hidden from My face, nor is their iniquity concealed from My eyes.

esv.text: For my eyes are on all their ways. They are not hidden from me, nor is their iniquity concealed from my eyes.

cnv.text: “因為我的眼察看他們所行的一切；在我面前這一切都無法隱藏，他們的罪孽不能從我眼前遮掩起來。

ccb.text: 因为我鉴察他们的一切行为，他们无法隐藏，他们的罪恶逃不过我的眼晴。
